from copy import deepcopy


DEFAULT_TEMPLATE = {
    "config": {"retries": 3, "timeout": 30, "headers": {"Accept": "application/json"}},
    "metadata": {"version": "1.0", "tags": ["default"]},
}


def build_request_variants(payloads):
    requests = []
    for payload in payloads:
        req = deepcopy(DEFAULT_TEMPLATE)
        req["body"] = payload
        requests.append(req)
    return requests


def generate_test_cases(base_params):
    cases = []
    for variant in base_params:
        case = deepcopy(DEFAULT_TEMPLATE)
        case["params"] = variant
        cases.append(case)
    return cases
